title: Advertisement: Recruitment of Chief Climate Action Officer & Other Posts under SC-3 (CITIIS 2.0), Directorate of Urban Local Bodies, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh
VVP-II atana Serchhip District chhung khaw 7 tana draft plan thlirho
content:
4642/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 27th February, 2026 :Vawiiin khan Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hovin Serchhip DC Meeting Hall-ah Vibrant Villages Programme II (VVP II) atana khaw sarih te draft action plan an thlirho.

Serchhip District chhunga VVP II kalpuina tur khuate hi Serchhip RD Block hnuaiah Keitum khua; East Lungdar RD Block hnuaiah Mualcheng, Lungkawlh, Bawktlang, North Vanlaiphai, Leng leh Sailulak te an ni a. Heng khaw hrang hrangte tana ruahmanna chipchiar siam tur hian line department te chu team a thendarh niin team leader pakhat theuh ruat an ni a. Team tinin an chanpual khua te tana hmasawnna proposal an siam te chu VVP-II guideline thlir chungin mumal taka action plan an duang a ni.

He an action plan siam te hi District Committee ah uluk taka enho niin siam that ngai lai leh ennawn ngai te chu sawiho a ni a. Plan siamtu team leader ten VC te leh technical mite rawn chungin siam that tul te siamthat ni se, an ti a. Heng an rawtna hrang hrangte hi District Committee chuan uluk taka enzuiin a thuphungin a pawm phawt a ni.

India-Myanmar leh India-Bangladesh ramri khuate huam turin Vibrant Village Programme II hi kum 2024 atang khan kalpui tan niin Serchhip District chhunga khaw sarih (7)-te hi a huam tel ta a. Central Sector Scheme a nih angin funding hi sawrkar laipuiin 100% a tum dawn a ni. Sawrkar laipui scheme kalpui mek sa te nen a theih chin chinah kaihkawp (converge) tur a ni a. Convergence a rem lo a nih chuan, MHA level ah endik leh tur a ni.

title: Serchhip DC kaihhruaina hnuaiah Rural Development Scheme kalpui dan thlirho
content:
4641/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 27th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Rural Development and Administration Department chuan Serchhip District chuan Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall-ah performance review meeting hun an hmang.

Meeting hi Serchhip Bawrhsap Pu Paul L.Khuma chuan hmanpuiin Project Director DRDO Dr Malsawmtluanga Fanchun leh BDO te an tel a Serchhip District a Rural Development Department hnuaia hnathawk zawng zawng an tel bawk a ni.

DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan block leh village level-a thawhhona tha zawk neih a pawimawhzia a sawi a, sawrkar scheme-te chu a dawngtu tur dik takin an dawn theihna tur leh tangkai taka hman a nih theih nan tan la turin thawktute a fuih. Hnathawh vil zui leh endik te, record tha leh dik tak vawn te, leh sawrkar guideline tha taka zawm a pawimawhzia te a sawi bawk a ni.

Meeting-ah hian thingtlang khaw hmasawnna tur sawrkar laipui scheme pawimawh  – Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act(MGNREGA), Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY), Mizoram State Rural Livelihoods Mission(MZSRLM) leh Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana (PMAY) hmalaknate chipchiar takin an thlirho a. Scheme hrang hrang enkawltuten PowerPoint presentation hmangin an sawifiah a. Sum hman ral dan te, hna thawh zawh tawh, thawh mek leh hmachhawp te sawihoin harsatna an tawh te chinfel dan an ngaihtuah a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District chhunga Hmeichhe VC te tan training neih a ni
content:
4640/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 27th of February, 2026 :Vawiin khan All Mizoram Elected Women Representatives leh State Legal Services Authority te tangkawpin Campaign on Schemes on NALSA and Capacity Building And Leadership Training Mamit District a VC hmeichhia te tan a buatsaih a. Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl.DC Mamit chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan VC atana thlan tlin hmeichhiate chu khawtlang rawngbawlna hna an thawhna hrang hrang ah an pawimawhna te hria a, sawrkar thawhpuitu tha tak ni chung a, mipuite tana rawngbawlna kawnga an mawhphurhna te hrilhin, fuihna thu a sawi.

Training Programme-ah hian Mamit District huamchhung a Village 92 atangin VC hmeichhia 83 an tel a, Dan leh Hrai zirtirna Pu H.Lalduhsanga CJM in zirtirna a pe a, Dan leh thupek kenkawh chungchang leh Police hnathawh hi Pi C.Lalbiaksiami Addl.SP in zirtirna  pein, Pu B. Lalpuia Head Faculty DPRC chuankhawtlang rorelna a, thlantlin hmeichhia mawhphurhna chungchangah zirtirna a pe bawk.

He hun hi Pi.R.Zomuanpuii President All Mizoram Elected Women Representatives chuan a kaihruai a ni.

title: HRIATTIRNA PAWIMAWH
content: 4638/2025-2026Dated Aizawl, the 27th February, 2026 :Mizoram State Quota a Diploma Printing Technology, Photography Regional Institute of Printing Technology, Kolkata, 2026-27 a zir duh chuan, Technical Wing, Higher & Technical Education, Chaltlang Lily Veng ah June thla ral hma in office hun chhungin dilna theh luh theih a ni ang.

title: "Sorkarin kum upate a ngaihsak; Pension pawh cheng 300 la thin cheng 1200 ah, Cheng 600 la thin Cheng 1500 ah tihsan sak an ni" - Social Welfare Minister
content:
4637/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 27th February, 2026 :Social Welfare, Tribal Affairs, Women & Child Development Department Minister PI Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin chawhma khan Mizoram Upa Pawl Aizawl South II Area Conference, ITI YMA a neih chu hmanpuiin, kum upa zawkte hnam leh khawtlang tana an hlutzia sawiin, ngaihhlut tur an nih thu leh, Sorkar pawhiin a ngaihpawimawh thu a sawi a. Kum upa Sorkar hnathawk pension-te a hmaa Cheng 300 la thin Cheng 1200 ah a tihsan sak thu leh Cheng 600 la thin pawh Cheng 1500 ah a tihsan sak nghal a nih thu a sawi.

He conference ah hian Minister chuan khawvel thiamna te sang chho zel ah, kum lama upa te pawh lo tam chhoh ve tak zel avangin hriselna lam a lo pawimawh zual thu a sawi a. Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme (MUCHS) hnuaiah pawh inenkawlna senso nei tam chu kum update an nih thu sawiin, kum upa te tan MUHCS a tangkai zual bik thu a sawi a. Hriselna lam ngai pawimawh tura fuihin, taksa sawizawi tha a, ei leh in uluk mai bakah tha taka mut theih Hi upa te hriselna atan a tha in a rin thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Pu Lalthangliana Varte, President in kaihruaiin, Pu Nghaklianmawia, President, MUP General Hqrs pawhin thu a sawi bawk a.  He conference ah hian hmasawnna lam kaihhnawih engemaw zat rel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Mizoram chhim lam district pali te tan thlai thar hralh chungchanga inrawn khawmna buatsaih a ni
content:
4636/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 27:Vawiin khan Mizoram Agricultural Marketing Board (MAMB) huaihawtin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah Mizoram chhim lam district pali – Lunglei, Siaha, Lawngtlai leh Hnahthial-a District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) member-te, Secondary Collection Centre (SSC) puipate leh Society hruaitute nena Thlai Thar Hralhna Chungchanga Inrawn Khawmna, "Consultative Meeting on Thlai Thar Market" buatsaih a ni a. Mizorama sawhthing hralhna man (rate) reserved price hman mek chu san hret an remti tlang.

title: ARMS LICENCE RENEW TURTE HRIATTUR
content:
4635/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 27th February, 2026 :Arms Act, 1959, Section-15 clause (1) leh clause (3) in a sawi ang leh Arms Rules, 2016-a Rule 24-in a sawi angin Aizawl District huamchhunga Silai Licencerenew ngai zawng zawngten an Arms Licence a rang lamin Deputy Commissioner Office, Aizawl, Arms Branch-ah renew vek tur a ni.

Arms Licence renew turte tana hriattur pawimawhte:

1. Renew Form Nazarat Branch, DC Office Aizawl atanga lakchhuah tur a ni.

2. Renew man hi Licence pakhatah kum 5 atan Rs 2500/- (Cheng Sanghnih

Zanga) zel a ni.

3. Licence a thih hnua renew turte tan licence pakhat zelah late fee Rs 2000/-

(Cheng Sanghnih) chawi belh a ngai.

4. Licence Renew turte tan Passport Size Photo 2 Nos. (a licence neitu thlalak

ngei) leh original Licence Booklet an rawn keng tel tur a ni.

He hriattirna hi zawm lo leh ngai pawimawh lo chu dan anga hmalak a nih pawhin an sawi buai thei lo ang.

Attachment

4634/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 27:Lunglei District Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA) huaihawta Lunglei Agriculture Complex-a ni hnih awh tur Kut Hna Thawktute Kutpui, "Kisan Mela" buatsaih chu vawiin khan Mizoram Sawrkara Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Department Secretary Pi Ramdinliani'n a hawng.

title: CHIEF ELECTORAL OFFICER-IN SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR), 2025 CHUNGCHANGAH POLITICAL PARTY-TE MEETING A NEIHPUI
content:
4633/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 27th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Dr. Lalrozama, Chief Electoral Officer (CEO) chuan MINECO-a a pisa-ah April atanga Mizorama kalpui tan tur, Special Intensive Revision (SIR), 2025 chungchangah political party aiawhte meeting a neihpui.

CEO Dr. Lalrozama chuan meeting hi kaihruaiin, SIR chu electoral roll siam that dan pakhat a ni a, political party aiawhte chu SIR chungchang an party-te theuh hnena chiang taka hriattir tura kohkhawm an ni tih a hrilh a. ‘Ram leh hnam tana thawhhona tur pawimawh a ni a, electoral roll thianghlim, tha leh dik siam a ngai a, vote thlak tur dik tak chiah an tel tur a ni’, a ti.

Pu James Miahlung, Deputy CEO-in SIR chungchang a sawifiah a. The Representation of the People Act (RP Act) Section 21 behchhana kalpui a nih thu leh kum 1951 leh 2004 inkarah SIR hi vawi 8 kalpui a lo ni tawh a, Mizoramah chuan kum 20 chuang kal ta, 2002-2004 inkar khan kalpui a lo ni tawh tih a sawi a. SIR thil tum te, electoral roll hman meka siamthat ngaite a tarlang a. SIR, 2025 chungchang sawiin, phase khatna chu Bihar-ah June ni 25, 2025 atang khan kalpui niin, September ni 30, 2025 khan final roll tihchhuah a ni a; phase hnihna chu October ni 28, 2025 atang khan state 12-ah kalpui tan a ni a; phase thumna kalpui chhoh tum mek a ni, a ti.

SIR kalpui dan tur leh official hrang hrangte mawhphurhna a sawi a. SIR atana Mizoram inbuatsaih mek dan tarlangin, electoral mapping (SIR hmasa zawka roll nena enkawp) chu 91.67% zawh a ni tawh tih a sawi a. SIR atana political party-te mawhphurhna hrilhin, duhthusam chuan polling station tinah Booth Level Agent (BLA) ruat ni thei se tih a sawi a. Mizoramah polling station 1301 a awm a, chu’nga party tin BLA neihzat hriattir an ni bawk.

Pi Ethel Rothangpuii, Joint CEO pawhin political party-te nena thawhho dan tur leh an laka beiseite sawiin, Mizoram chu kalphung felfai tak nei angin state dangte’n an en a, fai lamah leh lirthei tlan dan entawntlak avangin a lar a, tun hnaiah Mamit District Election Office-in Best Election District hnuaia Model Code of Conduct Implementation and Enforcement chawimawina an dawng bawk a, SIR kalpui danah pawh mi dangte entawntlak kan nih zel theih nan tanrual a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

Sawihona hun neih zawhah meeting hi tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Level Committee on VVP -II thukhawm
content:
4632/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit the 27th of February, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah District Level Committe on VVP -II chu Pi Carolyn L.B Khiangte,Addl. DC/Chairman VVP-II ni bawk kaihhruainain thutkhawm a ni.

Pi Carolyn L. B Khiangte chuan VVP-II chungchang sawizauna neiin, he scheme hnuaia Line Department te chu zirchianga theihtawp chhuah turin a chahin, a hlawhtlinna tura kan theihna zawn theuha thawk tlang turin kalkhawmte a chah bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Sawrkar laipui atanga Border Village-te chawikana atana hmalakna tur a huama, W.Phaileng leh Kawrtethawveng RD Block atangin Pu Obed Lalmalsawma, BDO Kawrtethawveng leh Pu Moses Ramdinthara, BDO W. Phaileng te chuan Border Village-te chawikanna atana ruahman Validation of Village Action Plan (VAP) chu a lem nen sawizauna an nei a, action plan hi sawizuina neih niin meeting hian a pawmpui a ni.

The Vibrant Village Programme - II hi Sawrkar laipui Ministry of Home Affairs kaltlanga Border Villages-te hmasawnna hna kalpuina tur niin, February, 2026 khan hawn a ni a. India ram chhunga UT-2,States - 15, Block - 334 leh Villages - 1954 ah te kalpui tur a ni, he scheme hi kum 5 chhunga kalpui tur niin, Mamit District chhung W. Phaileng RD Block chhunga khaw 4 leh Kawrtethawveng RD Block chhunga khaw 3 ah hmalak a ni ang. Border Villages-te tan Electricity, Solar Energy, Water, Healthcare, Education leh Telecom Connectivity tih changtlunna tura hmalak a ni ang.

Thutkhawmah hian committee members te an tel tha hle a ni.

Attachment

title: LOK SABHA MP-IN NEEPCO LEH NTPC CHAIRMAN A KAWM
content:
4631/2025-2026

Dated Delhi, the 27th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan North Eastern Electric Power Corporation (NEEPCO) Ltd. leh National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) Ltd. Chairman ni lai Gurdeep Singh chu a office-ah lengin a kawm.

Lok Sabha MP hnenah hian NEEPCO leh NTPC Chairman chuan Mizoram Sawrkarin a hun taka Power bill an pek tawh thin avangin lawmthu a lo sawi a, MP pawhin Sawrkarin a hun taka bill an pek avanga rebate vaibelchhe 7 chuang an dawn avangin lawmthu  a sawi  let bawk a. Tuirial Hydro Power Station tharchhuah hlep atanga CSR an hman thin chu Mizoramah ngei hman ni thei se tih sawiin, Mizoram chu state hnufual a nih avangin an CSR dangte pawh Mizoramah hmang thin turin a ngen bawk. Chairman chuan chutianga hma a lo lak tur thuin a lo chhang a ni.

Attachment

title: Surveyor lak Tharte an hna a rinawm turin Ministerin chah
content:
4630/2025-2026

Aizawl, 27th February, 2026 :Vawiin Assembly session chawlhlawk lai khan Land Revenue & Settlement Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova’n Directorate of Land Revenue & Settlement ah LR&S Department in Surveyor 14  a lak tharte chu a kawm.

Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Revenue Department chu department tawp, eirukna leh hlemhletna tamna leh a thawktute pawh dawr harsa tak anga hriat kan ni thin a, hei hi thlak tumin hotu lian ber atanga district office zawng zawngahte tan la in kan insiam tha mek a ni a ti a. Revenue Department mipuiin min thlir dan tam zawk chu mipui nena in dawr hnai ber Surveyor te kutah a awm tih sawiin, Minister chuan kan insiamthat kawngah hian a hma hruaitu ni turin kan surveyor thar te hi kan beisei che u a, in lakah kan thikthu pawh a chhe dawn hle a ni, tiin hnuhma tha hnutchhiah turin a chah.

Pu Chhanzova chuan Sawrkar hna tha tak an neih chu thil danga thleng an phal loh a rin thu sawiin mi chan ai chuh te, compensation lakna tura rinawm lo taka thil tihte, ram tehna a lo tlak zeh ve phette, sawrkar a ram surrender tur ram tehnaa a neitute nena lo in siamrem puia report diklo pekte leh eirukna lam rawng kai reng renga inhnamhnawih lo tur leh; an nun uluka ruihlo laka in vawng tlat turin Surveyor tharte chu a chah a. Helam kawnga an seniorte harhvang deuh an lo tawng palh a nih pawhin an hnung zui lo ngam turin a chah. Sawrkar thar a awm hnua surveyor lut tharte chu Surveyor chhuanthar; dikna leh felna kengkawh tute nitura an beisei thu Minister hian a sawi bawk. Minister chuan Revenue Departmentin  inthenfai hna an thawh mekah diklo taka thiltite an laka evidence tha tawk tak a awm chuan an dim dawn loh thu sawiin, complaint dan tur dik taka complaint awmte chu an bawhzui zel thu a sawi a ni.

Surveyor indaihlohna hriain Chief Ministerin mi thar 14 lakna tur a phal sak chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Minister chuan MPSC lamin felfai leh rang takin hma an laknaah lawmthu a sawi a. Recruitment Rules chungchanga court kal an awm avanga surveyor tling tharte appointment an pek mai theih loh dan te leh chu buaina chinfel a nih ruala District hrang hranga post tura surveyorte’n training an zo thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi. Minister chuan Surveyor dang 30 lakna tur exam pawh zawh fel a ni leh tawh chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, mipui mamawhna a san em avangin  MPSC pawhin result rang takin peih sak vat thei se a lawmawm tur thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: NATIONAL SCIENCE DAY 2026 LAWM A NI
content:
4628/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 27th February 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Science, Technology & Innovation Council (MISTIC) bultumin India ram puma hman thin ‘National Science Day’ lawmna hun, Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall-ah hman a ni. He hunah hian Planning & Programme Implementation Department Secretary Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau chu khuallian niin, Directorate of Science & Technology Chief Scientific Officer Er. H. Lalsawmliana’n inkhawm hi a kaihruai a. Directorate of Science & Technology (DST); MISTIC; Mizoram Remote Sensing Application Centre (MIRSAC) leh Mizoram Science Centre (MSC) te bakah Science kaihhnawih zirna in leh pawl hrang hrang hruaitute bakah zirlai thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Khuallian chuan Science & Technology pawimawhzia sawiin Science & Technology-a thawktute chu ram hmasawnna innghahna lungpui pawimawh tak an nih thu a sawi a. India ramin ram hmasawn leh intodelh ‘Viksht Bharat’ nih tuma tan a lak meknaah pawh, a kila lung tangkai berte chu Science mite an nih thu sawiin, Mizoramah ngei pawh ram hmasawnna atana Science & Technology-te hmalakna hrang hrangte tarlangin, nakin lawka ram hruaitu la nimai tur zirlaite thinlunga Science pawimawhna tuhtu an nih thu te, sik leh sa danglam dan Data an lakkhawm te, ram leilung dinhmun leh riruang thlalak GIS Map an buatsaih thinte leh zoram mil technology an zir thinnate chu Mizoramin ei leh bara intodelhna kawnga hma a lakna hrang hrang, lo neih lam leh a kaihhnawih Agriculture & Allied sector-te tan pawh thil pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. He ni lawmnaa kalkhawm Science & Technology-a thawktute leh zirlaite chu theihtawp chhuaha, ram tan an thiamna leh theihnate ti pung deuh deuh tura chahin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Khuallian’in tun hnaia Science & Technology (DST, MISTIC, MIRSAC, MSC) hmalakna langsar zual a sawite:

• Mizorama Bio resources-te tangkai lehzuala Mizote’n kan hman theihna turin Mizoram Biotechnology Centre sak mek a ni.

•Space lam zirna leh hman tangkaina atan State Geo-Spatial Data Centre, vaibelchhe 16.8 man hu tur din turin hma lak a ni a, thui tak kalpui tawh a ni.

•Pa (mushroom) Centre tha tak din niin mizo thalaiten eizawnna tlaka Pa chi hrang hrang an khawi thiam theihna turin training pek thin an ni.

• Sialhawkah lakhuihthei chingtute tan hlu zawk leh man man zawk ni tura lakhuihthei an sawngbawl theihna tur Pineapple Processing Plant din niin hawn mai theih tura peih a ni tawh.

•Lunglengah kurtai thar chhuahna lama hmasawnna tur nasa taka kalpui mek a ni.

•Selinga Food Processing Centre thawm that niin khawl thar pahnih bun a ni a.

•Zamuangah kuhva chingtute tan kuhva tih rona khawl din mek a ni.

• Tualchher kut themthiamna neite tan, an thiamna leh theihna tih punna turin Innovation Facility Centre (IFC), MINECO-ah din fel a ni tawh a. IFC hi local grassroot innovator leh entrepreneur mai bakah sorkar department hrang hrang ten an hmang tangkai hle a. Mizoram tana chhenfakawm tak tak khawlte an siam chhuak thin a ni.

•State Climate Change Cell din niin Mizoram sik leh sa inthlak danglamin kawng hrang hranga nghawng a neih theih dante zirbingna an kalpui bawk a.

•Thiamna leh theihna humhimna lam - Intellectual Property Rights hrang hrang - Copyright, Trademark, Geographical Indication, Patent leh a dangte an buaipui bawk.

• Zirlaite thinlunga science leh mathematics hlauhna tih bo a nih theih nan kawng hrang hranga hmalak thin a ni a. Science lam ngaihhlutna an neih theih nan Aizawl bakah Lungleiah pawh Science Centre din a ni tawh bawk.

• Science chawi larna leh hman tangkaina turin nasa takin hma lak a ni a. Hemi atan hian  kum tluanin programme hrang hrangte duan thin niin Mathematics competition leh Science competition, exhibition-te buatsaih thin niin hetiang programme atanga Science zirna lama tuina leh phurna nei, hlawkpuitute hi zirlai sing chuang an awm tawh a ni.

•Mizorama a hmasaber ni turin khawzawl-ah ni zung chakna hmanga thlai vawnthatna ‘Soloar Cold Storage’ an lo bun tawh bawk a ni.

•Bana Kaih Policy hnuaiah Chief Minister’s Inventor Challenge buatsaih niin Mizoram mil khawl (technology) siam chhuah dan kawng zawna, hmalak mek reng a ni bawk.

Vawiina National Science Day hawnna inkhawmah hian Mizoram Science Centre-a Curator Dr. Lalrinkimi chuan hmeichhiate’n Science lama hma an sawn dan leh Mizo hmeichhe hlawhtlingte tarlanna hun a  hmang a; NIT Dean (Academics) Sukanta Roy bakah Dr. Lalchhandami Tochhawng, Scientific Officer leh Pu Lalchhuanmawia Scientific Officer ten thu an sawi bawk. Pu K. Lalrammuana, Principal Scientific Officer, DST chuan lawmthu sawiin chawhma hun hi a khar a.

Chawhnu hunah Scientist, Professor leh Entrepreneur-te nen thupui hrang hrang hmangin thu sawina leh zir hona hun hman ho leh a ni a.Mizoram Remote Sensing Application Centre, Mizoram Science Centre, Mushroom Centre, Patent Information Centre, Innovation Facility Centre, State Climate Change Cell, India Met Department leh National Institute of Technology Mizoram ten exhibit item hrang hrang an entir bawk a.Science lama mi hlunte, Science NGO hruaitute, Sorkar lama Planning leh Science & Technology-a thawktute bakah zirna in hrang hrang National Institute of Technology Mizoram, RIPANS, ITI leh Boston HSS atang tein zirlai te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah Road Safety Month 2026, Awareness on Road Safety hman a ni
content:
4627/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 27th February 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan Zaingen Branch Y.M.A Hall-ah District Road Safety Committee Khawzawl District huaihawtin Road Safety Month 2026, Awareness on Road Safety  hman a ni. Thupui atan Road Safety – Life Safety tih a ni.

He hun hi Kaphmingliana E.E PWD, Member Secretary, District Road Safety Committee, Khawzawl District in a kaihruai a, Pu Zosangliana, Addl. SP hnen atangin Traffic Rules tih thupui hmangin Traffic Rules zawm that pawimawh ziate, Traffic rules zawm loh avanga Lirthei chetsualna thleng a awm thin thute ngaihthlak a ni a, Pu Benjamin Lalhmingsanga, DTO hnen atangin MV Act & Rules tih thupui hmangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni. Good Samaritan  tih thupui hmangin Pu PC. Rosiama, President, Sub Hq YMA hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk. He hunah hian Lirthei neia eizawngtu pawl hrang hrang aiawh te an tel a ni.

title: AFRICAN SWINE FEVER (ASF) HRILEG ORDER SUT CHUNGCHANGA DEPUTY COMMISSIONER, KOLASIB THUCHHUAH
content:
4626/2025-2026

Kolasib; Dated the 27th February, 2026 :Deputy Commissioner, Kolasib chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian African Swine Fever (ASF) hrileng order sut chungchangah mipuite hriat tur thuchhuah a siam.

District AH & Veterinary Officer, Kolasib hnen atanga ngenna lehkha vide No. B. 13022/1/2023-DAH & V(K) - ASF Dated 25.02.2026 kan hmuh angin Kolasib District a Vawk, ASF Negative Certificate (RAgT/RT-PCR) nei te tana Vawk lak luh phalna Order No. J.31015/2025-DC(K) Dated 06.02.2026 District Magistrate, Kolasib in a lo chhuah tawh chu vawiin ni 25.02.2026 hian thu leh awm hma chu sut leh (Cancel) a ni e.

title: Khawzawlah PM-NAPS inzirtirna hun hmang
content:
4625/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 27th February 2026 :Nimin khan Labour, Employment, Skill Development & Entrepreneurship (LESDE) Department leh Khawzawl DC Office ṭang kawp huaihawtin Khawzawl DC Conference Hall-ah Prime Minister’s National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (PM-NAPS) leh Apprenticeship Portal chungchang inzirtirna workshop buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi Election Officer/BDO, Pu Timothy R.Lalhmangaiha chuan hmanpuiin, Apprenticeship pawimawhzia leh zirlai leh hna zawng mekte bakah, a ruaitu (employer)-te tan pawh thil ṭangkai tak a nih thu a sawi a. NAPS chuan ṭhalaite chu an hna zawnna, hna thawhna leh ei zawnna kawng hrang hrangah a chher hriam dawn a ni tiin, NAPS chungchang inzirtirna workshop buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hna neitu (employer) establishment leh hna zawngtur zirlai hrang hrang kal khawmte chungah lawm thu sawiin, scheme chhawr ṭangkaitu ni ngei turin a sawm nghal.

He hunah hian LESDE Department atangin Pu Donny C.Lallawmkima chuan PM-NAPS chungchang a sawifiah a, Apprenticeship Portal-a inziah luh dan leh a hman dan te a sawi fiah bawk. Online Registration pawh tih nghal niin, Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawihona hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: LO HAL HUN PAWH SEI CHUNGCHANGA DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, KOLASIB THUCHHUAH
content:
4624/2025-2026

Kolasib; Dated the 27th February, 2026:District Magistrate, Kolasib chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian Lo hal hun pawh sei chungchangah mipuite hriat tur thuchhuah a siam.

District Magistrate, Kolasib in lo hal chungchanga Order dated 27 January, 2026 a lo chhuah tawh chu tunah hian Handholding Policy hnuaiah hmalakna hrang hrang kalpui mek a nih avangin March ni 15 hma a lo hal vek tur ti a thupek chhuah tawh chu hand holding hnuai a thlai leh thingphun thlangtu heng Hmunphiah, Hmarcha leh Sawhthing chingtute tan March ni 31, 2026 thleng lo hal hun pawh sei a ni tih kan han in hriattir e.

title: TLAKLUI TO SIHPUI ROAD, INDUSTRY PENG, RAMHLUN VENGLAI ATANGA SIHPUI INKAR KAWNG KHAR/BLOCK CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
4621/2025-2026

Aizawl the 27th February, 2026 :Mizoram State Sorkar Notification No.B.12021/10/04-TRP Dt.22.8.2008 leh Section 115 of MV Act, 1988-in thunelhna a pek ang leh Sr. Executive Engineer, PWD, Aizawl Road North Division ngenna angin Pu C. Vanlalvena, Superintendent of Police, Traffic, Aizawl chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

PWD, Aizawl Road North Division, Sub Division-1 chuan District Industry Centre ram, Ramhlun Venglai-ah kawng laih zau hna an thawk dawn a, hnathawh chhungin a hnuaia tarlan ang hian kawngkhar/blocka ni dawn tih mipuite kan inhriattir e.
